verdict.summary: Guide is mostly solid on the current marriage/união de facto route, but it contains serious problems around the 2026 pending nationality-law reform, an internal contradiction on the criminal-threshold rule, and an overstatement that the process is identical for CPLP/Portuguese-speaking applicants.

issues.current: **03.05.2026 Президент Сегуру промульгировал Decreto AR 48/XVII** — на 13.05.2026 закон ВСЁ ЕЩЁ НЕ опубликован в DRE
issues.problem: As of the April 2026 reference point, the new nationality law had been approved by Parliament on 01.04.2026 and was awaiting promulgation/publication. The guide states later May 2026 political/legal events as settled facts. This is outside the April 2026 verification frame and should not be presented as current law unless re-verified against official Presidency/DRE records.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: "01.04.2026 Парламент одобрил новую редакцию закона о гражданстве; на дату проверки в апреле 2026 закон ожидал промульгации Президентом и публикации в Diário da República. До публикации и вступления в силу продолжают действовать правила Lei 37/81."
issues.source: Assembleia da República / Diário da República; developer reference: new nationality law approved 01.04.2026 awaiting promulgation

issues.current: Промульгирован Президентом Сегуру 03.05.2026. На 13.05.2026 публикация в DRE ВСЁ ЕЩЁ НЕ состоялась
issues.problem: Same issue as TLDR: the guide presents post-April 2026 events as verified facts, while the required accuracy baseline says the law was approved on 01.04.2026 and awaiting promulgation. Also the statement depends on a specific Presidency notice and DRE non-publication status that must be checked daily; it is too time-sensitive for a guide last-verified against April sources.
issues.suggestion: Downgrade to a pending-law note tied to the April 2026 status: "Законопроект/декрет был одобрен 01.04.2026, но на дату проверки ещё не вступил в силу; проверяйте DRE перед подачей." Remove the claim about 03.05.2026 promulgation unless the guide is explicitly updated after DRE/Presidency verification.
issues.source: Diário da República; Assembleia da República

issues.current: После публикации в DRE ... порог криминальной чистоты ужесточится с 5 до 3 лет лишения свободы.
issues.problem: Internal contradiction and likely outdated framing. In the current-law requirements section the guide already says the criminal threshold is ≥3 years. Therefore it cannot also say that the pending law will change it from 5 to 3. The current Lei da Nacionalidade opposition ground is already based on conviction for crime punishable with imprisonment of 3 years or more under Portuguese law.
issues.suggestion: Remove "с 5 до 3". Write either: "требование по судимостям сохраняется/формулируется как condenação por crime punível com pena de prisão igual ou superior a 3 anos segundo a lei portuguesa" or, if the new law truly changes wording, describe the exact new wording without contradicting the current-law section.

issues.current: порог криминальной чистоты ужесточится с 5 до 3 лет лишения свободы
issues.problem: Same contradiction as in TLDR. The guide’s own current-law checklist already uses the 3-year threshold. This makes the pending-law summary misleading.
issues.suggestion: Align the pending-law summary with the current-law checklist and the actual wording of Lei 37/81 art. 9. Do not describe a change from 5 to 3 unless citing the exact pre-reform provision where 5 years applied.

issues.current: Граждане CPLP, ЕС, третьих стран — условия те же. Нет «ускоренных» маршрутов для бразильцев или итальянцев — 3 года брака нужны всем.
issues.problem: The 3-year marriage/união de facto threshold is the same, but saying the conditions/process are fully the same is misleading. Portuguese-speaking/CPLP applicants may have an easier route to proving or presuming effective connection to the Portuguese community, especially because knowledge of Portuguese and links to Portuguese-speaking countries can matter under the Regulation. This is particularly relevant for Brazilians.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Минимальный срок брака/união de facto — 3 года для всех. Но доказательство ligação efetiva может быть проще для заявителей из португалоязычных стран/с владением португальским языком; проверяйте презумпции в Regulamento da Nacionalidade."
issues.source: Decreto-Lei 237-A/2006, Regulamento da Nacionalidade Portuguesa, provisions on ligação efetiva

issues.current: В отличие от натурализации (по 5/7/10 годам проживания)
issues.problem: This is confusing/outdated. Under current ordinary naturalisation rules the standard residence period is 5 years. The 7/10-year figures relate to proposed or historical/pending reform discussions, not the current ordinary naturalisation baseline as of April 2026.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: "В отличие от обычной натурализации по сроку легального проживания, по браку/união de facto ключевым является срок брака/союза с гражданином Португалии." Avoid listing 7/10 as current rules unless discussing the pending reform separately.

issues.current: ⚖️ Отсутствие судимостей в любой стране с наказанием ≥ 3 лет лишения свободы
issues.problem: The wording is too broad/imprecise. The nationality-law opposition ground is not simply any foreign conviction with a foreign-law sentence of ≥3 years. The key test is conviction, with final judgment, for a crime punishable with imprisonment of 3 years or more according to Portuguese law. Foreign criminal records must be disclosed, but the legal assessment is under Portuguese-law equivalence.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Отсутствие вступившей в силу судимости за преступление, которое по португальскому праву наказывается лишением свободы на срок 3 года или более; справки о несудимости нужны из соответствующих стран."

issues.current: порог презумпции «эффективных связей» вырастет с 6 до 7–8 лет
issues.problem: The phrase "7–8 years" is vague and not legally usable. A guide should state the exact rule from the approved text or avoid giving a numeric threshold until promulgation/publication. Also, because the law was not yet in force as of April 2026, this must be clearly labelled as pending and subject to change.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: "Проект меняет правила презумпции ligação efetiva; точные сроки и условия нужно проверять по опубликованному тексту в DRE после вступления закона в силу." If citing the approved decree, quote the exact article and exact threshold.
issues.source: Assembleia da República approved text of 01.04.2026; DRE after publication

issues.current: CIPLE A2 — формально НЕ требуется ... На практике IRN может оценивать владение языком как косвенный признак «эффективной связи» при браках <6 лет
issues.problem: The conclusion is broadly right, but the wording understates that Portuguese language knowledge can be one of the legally relevant ways to evidence/presume ligação efetiva under the Regulation. It is not merely an informal IRN practice.
issues.suggestion: Write: "CIPLE не является самостоятельным обязательным документом для этой категории, но знание португальского языка может помогать доказать/подтвердить ligação efetiva по Regulamento da Nacionalidade, особенно если нет 6 лет брака или португальских детей."

issues.problem: Portugal does not have a single universal "sworn translator" system equivalent to some other countries. For Portuguese authorities, what usually matters is a certified/legalised translation in an accepted form, often certified by a Portuguese notary, lawyer, solicitor, chamber of commerce, consulate, or otherwise accepted authority.
issues.suggestion: Replace "присяжный перевод" with "заверенный перевод на португальский в форме, принимаемой IRN/консульством".

issues.problem: Same translation terminology problem as above. "Sworn translation" may mislead applicants from jurisdictions where only court-sworn translators exist.
issues.suggestion: Use "заверенный перевод на португальский; апостиль/легализация — если применимо".

issues.problem: This is probably correct for acquisition by marriage/união de facto, but the word "обычно" may create uncertainty. For a sensitive application category, the guide should tell users to download the current official form rather than rely on a model number that can change.
issues.suggestion: Write: "используйте актуальную форму IRN для aquisição da nacionalidade por casamento ou união de facto, доступную на justica.gov.pt/IRN; на дату проверки это Modelo 3."
issues.source: IRN — Nacionalidade por casamento ou união de facto

issues.current: Онлайн через портал IRN — только если соответствующий тип заявления доступен на портале; на практике канал чаще используется через advogado/solicitador
issues.problem: This is cautious, but it lacks the important caveat that access to online nationality applications has historically been limited by applicant type and/or professional authentication. Readers may still assume direct self-service is normally available.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Онлайн-подача зависит от текущей доступности сервиса и способа аутентификации; часто полноценная онлайн-подача доступна через advogado/solicitador/notário, а не как открытый self-service для всех заявителей."

issues.current: Официальный срок по закону — 1 год. Фактически в 2025–2026: 8–24 месяца.
issues.problem: The practical range is plausible, but "official legal deadline — 1 year" needs a precise legal source. Nationality proceedings have several procedural stages and real processing times often exceed nominal targets; presenting 1 year as a hard official deadline can mislead applicants.
issues.suggestion: Either cite the exact legal/procedural basis for the 1-year figure or soften: "IRN may indicate target/average timings, but there is no reliably enforceable 1-year completion in practice; many cases take 8–24+ months."

issues.current: право на натурализацию по браку теряется
issues.problem: Terminology error. Citizenship through marriage/união de facto is acquisition of nationality by declaration/effect of will, not ordinary naturalisation.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: "право на приобретение гражданства по браку/união de facto теряется".

issues.current: Presidência da República — Promulgação Decreto AR 48/XVII (Lei da Nacionalidade), lastRetrieved 2026-05-04
issues.problem: This source is post-April 2026 and is used to support claims that conflict with the April 2026 status requirement. If the guide is meant to be verified as of April 2026, this source should not be part of the verified factual baseline.
issues.suggestion: For an April 2026 version, replace with the official Assembleia da República page for the 01.04.2026 approval and state that promulgation/publication was pending. For a May 2026 version, also add the DRE publication source once available.
issues.source: Assembleia da República; Diário da República

issues.problem: The guide claims verification after the alleged May promulgation/non-publication events, but the source list still lacks a DRE publication/non-publication reference and the content remains internally inconsistent on the criminal threshold. This makes the verification date misleading.
issues.suggestion: Either change the verification date to the actual April verification date or update all pending-law statements against Presidency + DRE + Assembleia sources and resolve the contradictions.
issues.source: Diário da República; Presidência da República; Assembleia da República

missing_topics: Exact current legal basis for oposição by Ministério Público and the distinction between IRN document intake and later MP opposition for falta de ligação efetiva
Exact presumptions/evidence categories for ligação efetiva under the Regulamento da Nacionalidade, including relevance of Portuguese language and Portuguese-speaking country links
Clear warning that the criminal-record test is assessed by reference to Portuguese law, not simply the foreign sentence label
DRE publication check for the 2026 nationality-law reform before relying on any new deadlines or transitional rules
Clarification that acquisition by marriage/união de facto is not ordinary naturalisation and uses different terminology/procedure
